compliance_findings.message: All external ingress passes through an edge guard (WAF / CDN / API gateway / load balancer).
No data-tier components are exposed in a public trust zone.
All external edges use encrypted protocols.
All edges into restricted zones are encrypted.
No Azure PaaS components detected.
No external north-south flows detected.
No logging, monitoring, or SIEM component shown on the diagram.
Databases or third-party SaaS present, but no secrets vault is shown.

compliance_findings.message: External traffic terminates on a component that is not an edge guard (WAF / CDN / API gateway / load balancer).
No data-tier components are exposed in a public trust zone.
External edges use plaintext protocols (HTTP/FTP/Telnet/AMQP/MQTT).
Edges to restricted zones use plaintext protocols.
Azure PaaS components lack a Private Endpoint in their trust zone.
External flows exist but no identity provider is shown.
No logging, monitoring, or SIEM component shown on the diagram.
Databases or third-party SaaS present, but no secrets vault is shown.
